data.name: Company has an approved Cryptography Policy
data.description: This test verifies that your company has an approved [Cryptography Policy](/policies/cryptography-policy-bsi) in Vanta.
data.failureDescription: You don't have an approved Cryptography Policy yet.
data.remediationDescription: Use our [policy templates](/policies?policy=Cryptography%20Policy) to create and approve a custom Cryptography Policy for your company.
